data.title: 2025-2026 holiday-season returns exceed 10% globally
data.description: The top reason for all returns — whether legitimate, fraudulent or abusive — was that consumers considered the products they received to be "significantly not as described" (SNAD), according to Signifyd data.

data.title: Amazon closing Go and Fresh stores as same-day grocery delivery plans expand
data.description: The Amazon Fresh brand will remain is use for delivery services as some stores close and others become Whole Foods Market locations.

data.title: Mastercard launches ‘agent suite’ to help merchants deploy agentic AI
data.description: The launch comes as payments networks, fintech firms and large technology companies race to define standards for agentic commerce — a model in which AI agents not only recommend products but can complete transactions on behalf of users.

data.title: Home Depot introduces AI tool to help contractors build project material lists faster
data.description: In addition to the AI tool, Home Depot promotes services such as trade credit financing, same-day and scheduled delivery, two-hour pickup, dedicated account management and preferred pricing on frequently purchased materials.

data.title: GrubMarket introduces AI monitoring tool for food distributors and produce operators
data.description: GrubMarket has been expanding its software offerings to food wholesalers and distributors alongside its ecommerce marketplace business.
